title: Tensura Compat: Tough as Nails
description: Adds extra compat between Tensura: Reincarnated and Tough As Nails
body:
Adds extra compatability between Tensura Reincarnated and Tough As Nails



Majin no longer need to drink (Can still drink if you wish, just won't go below 18 Thirst)

Thirst bar doesn't render while Majin



Tensura already has in built compat with the Tempature just not Thirst
